title: release/19.x: [InstCombine] Handle constant GEP expr in `SimplifyDemandedUseBits` (#116794)

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on array indexing with i64 indices, but this test uses struct field indexing with i32 indices and multiple GEP levels (0, 1). The GEPOperator generalization enables this struct-field pattern which is not explicitly mentioned in the summary.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
@GC_struct = global 16 bytes, align 4

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_struct_field() {
entry:
  %gep = gep inbounds ptr @GC_struct, 16 x i32 0, 1 x i64 4
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %gep, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
=>
@GC_struct = global 16 bytes, align 4

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_struct_field() {
entry:
  %__constexpr_0 = gep inbounds ptr @GC_struct, 1 x i64 4
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %__constexpr_0, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes single GEP optimization but doesn't cover chained GEP patterns where one GEP result feeds into a load that becomes the base for another GEP. The GEPOperator generalization enables optimization of the second GEP in the chain with dynamic indices.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
@GC_outer = global 16 bytes, align 8

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_chain(i64 %idx) {
entry:
  %outer_gep = gep inbounds ptr @GC_outer, 16 x i32 0, 1 x i64 0
  %load_ptr = load ptr, ptr %outer_gep, align 8
  %inner_gep = gep inbounds ptr %load_ptr, 128 x i64 0, 1 x i64 %idx
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %inner_gep, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
=>
@GC_outer = global 16 bytes, align 8

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_chain(i64 %idx) {
entry:
  %load_ptr = load ptr, ptr @GC_outer, align 8
  %inner_gep = gep inbounds ptr %load_ptr, 128 x i64 0, 1 x i64 %idx
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %inner_gep, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions GC_arrays struct but doesn't discuss multi-field struct GEPs with field indices. This tests struct field access patterns with multiple GEP indices affecting alignment.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
@global_struct = global 16 bytes, align 4

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_struct_field_access() {
entry:
  %field_ptr = gep inbounds ptr @global_struct, 16 x i64 0, 1 x i64 4
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %field_ptr, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
=>
@global_struct = global 16 bytes, align 4

define ptr @ptrmask_gep_struct_field_access() {
entry:
  %__constexpr_0 = gep inbounds ptr @global_struct, 1 x i64 4
  %masked = ptrmask ptr %__constexpr_0, i64 -8
  ret ptr %masked
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
